figures.caption: Table 4: Subjective results of prompt-based and tag-based TTS. “–” indicates not applicable. Best is in bold and second-best is underlined within each language and each system type.
Table 5: LLM evaluation results of prompt-based and tag-based TTS. “–” indicates not applicable. Best is in bold and second-best is underlined within each language and each system type.
Table 2: NVV inventories of representative tag-based TTS systems and datasets. § indicates commercial TTS systems. † marks tags with higher intensity, loudness, or speed.

Table 3: Objective results of prompt-based and tag-based TTS over three synthesis rounds. Best is in bold and second-best is underlined within each block, excluding the “(w/o NVV)” rows. “–” indicates not applicable.
